summary.intent: Implement GridList adapter components for Leptos and Dioxus (tasks #398/#490), then iteratively improve examples, DnD behavior, and documentation to achieve practical parity with React Aria's GridList reference implementation.
summary.outcome: GridList adapters were implemented with SSR/unit/wasm tests and E2E coverage, examples were upgraded to showcase all major features, a docs-only PR (#721) was opened restructuring adapter workflow documentation into a split guide with agnostic-first and counterpart-parity requirements, and DnD snap-back bugs were fixed by moving shared behavior into the agnostic core layer.

repo: Adapter test files must be named `test_*.rs` (not `grid_list.rs`) for `cargo xtask lint adapter-parity` to discover and count them
Leptos wasm tests require `--no-default-features --features csr,ars-i18n/web-intl`; Dioxus wasm tests require `--no-default-features --features web,ars-i18n/web-intl`
Fixture crates are not workspace members; must use `cargo check --manifest-path <path>/Cargo.toml` instead of `-p`
E2E category modules should use directory-backed structure: `categories/<category>/mod.rs` + `categories/<category>/<component>.rs`
The `cargo xtask spec validate` and `cargo xtask lint adapter-parity` gates must stay green throughout adapter work
`dx serve --web --port PORT --open false --interactive false` is required for non-TTY dev server; `dx serve` without `--interactive false` hangs in non-terminal contexts
The pre-commit hook runs silently for several minutes and the git commit tool session does not return output until it completes — Git has still recorded the commit
Dioxus `EventHandler<T>` is not `Send + Sync` and cannot be captured inside agnostic `Callback` props; adapter must bridge via local effects instead
Leptos `view!` macro rejects turbofish syntax inside prop expressions; move to a local binding first
`cargo xtask spec component-deps` and `cargo xtask spec issue-deps --dry-run` must be run before starting adapter implementation to verify blockers

The adapter spec files (spec/leptos-components/, spec/dioxus-components/) have a spec-conformance test that checks expected part lists — both the spec and the conformance test must be updated together

code.finding: Core agnostic layer owns: layout metadata, section/header traversal, structural-node skipping, selection semantics, disabled behavior, press-up selection policy, hover/press/drop-target state, loading suppression, DnD drag-key resolution, drop validity, reorder payload construction, grid preview ordering, and render blocks — adapters must not reimplement any of these

Leptos adapter owns: DOM event conversion, NodeRef refs, IntersectionObserver setup, native DataTransfer drag image setup via web-sys (wasm-only gated), and rendering core attrs into Leptos view nodes. Render must be reactive to core DnD state to avoid stale cell attrs.

Dioxus adapter uses CopyValue for per-instance values captured by multiple closures; EventHandler is not Send+Sync so DnD callbacks use a local bridge pattern. setDragImage requires dioxus-web::WebEventExt behind the `web` feature flag.

Adapter-level component work must fully read docs/implementation/adapter-component-delivery.md and all linked workflow files before planning; the checklist is not a substitute. Must include live browser review of counterpart (React Aria first, then Ark UI, Radix) before implementation.

Synthetic browser DnD in E2E requires: (1) fire dragstart, (2) wait a frame for framework rerender, (3) reacquire target element from fresh DOM query, (4) fire dragenter/dragover on the fresh element. Stale element references after dragstart-triggered rerenders cause dragover to silently fail.
Converted from monolithic 1300-line doc to a routing entry point; detailed guidance split into docs/implementation/adapter-components/ with 8 workflow files and 3 checklists.

Widget examples must not reimplement component behavior (drag keys, drop targets, placement, grid preview order). They should only hold demo item state and apply reorder from on_dnd_event. Demo DnD visual state (preview, indicator) comes from ItemRenderState provided by the adapter.
DropPosition has Before/After/On variants. On is for tree-style drops; should be mapped conservatively to After in list/grid reorder helpers.

workflow: React Aria / React Spectrum is the primary reference for component parity; must inspect the live docs page in-browser before planning adapter implementation, not just reading spec files

Adapter examples must visually showcase all supported features (selection indicators, disabled states, actions/links, empty/loading, DnD with drop preview, grid vs list layout) — this must be verified with a browser check before reporting the task complete

Renderer-independent behavior (selection rules, drag key sets, drop validity, reorder math, loading suppression, section skipping) belongs in crates/ars-components; duplicating these in each adapter or in widget demos is a workflow violation

Browser DnD requires dragover.preventDefault() for drop to fire; once dragstart triggers a framework rerender moving the source element under the pointer, the source element must accept dragover events as a proxy while a pending drop target is stored
Grid live preview must commit reorder using the core-stored pending drop target, not the event's current target, because the source preview card moves under the pointer during dragover
The in-app browser automation layer does not emit HTML drag events through coordinate or pointer APIs; browser-backed E2E (Playwright/WebDriver) is required to prove DnD behavior
Sandbox blocks local server binding for E2E and dev server commands; requires explicit escalation/approval for those network operations
All six widget crates (plain/CSS/Tailwind × Leptos/Dioxus) must have feature parity — copying Tailwind showcase and patching only styling-specific markup is the correct approach
Pre-commit hooks run silently for minutes; the git tool session appears hung but the commit usually succeeds — verify with `git log -1` rather than interrupting

friction: Sandbox blocked local server binding for E2E fixture dev servers and dx serve on every run, requiring repeated escalation approvals
Pre-commit hooks ran silently for 3-5 minutes on every commit, making the git commit tool appear hung and requiring manual `git log` checks to confirm success
In-app browser automation cannot synthesize HTML drag events, making visual DnD verification impossible through that path; relied on browser-backed E2E instead
Dioxus EventHandler is not Send+Sync — discovered at compile time after initial adapter design was already implemented, requiring a bridge pattern redesign
dx serve with TTY hung mid-rebuild; required --interactive false flag for reliable non-interactive use
Leptos view! macro rejects turbofish syntax in prop expressions, requiring local bindings as workarounds
Synthetic E2E drag events hit stale DOM element references after dragstart-triggered rerenders, requiring a multi-step fresh-query approach
Adapter parity lint (`cargo xtask lint adapter-parity`) silently skips test files not named `test_*.rs`, leading to false green before renaming
cargo +nightly fmt reformatted large files, causing subsequent apply_patch calls to fail with context mismatches
The `cargo xtask spec component-deps` command required building xtask in the fresh worktree, adding significant latency at the start
Codex review bot added new threads requiring multiple push/trigger/wait cycles before PR could be approved
open_items: Checkbox adapter component implementation deferred to separate session; GridList selection indicator visual consistency with Checkbox pending until that work is done

GridList parity gaps still remain: sections/headers adapter rendering partially implemented but not fully exercised in E2E, IntersectionObserver-based load-more not yet wired, keyboard DnD not implemented
React Aria API surface not yet mapped: disabledBehavior='selection', shouldSelectOnPressUp, keyboardNavigationBehavior, layout/orientation runtime data attrs, dragAndDropHooks full API
Large GridList implementation branch (codex/issues-398-490-gridlist-adapters) has uncommitted code; not yet pushed or PR'd — docs PR (#721) was the only thing pushed
DropPosition::On variant conservatively mapped to After in reorder helpers; proper tree-style drop support not investigated
Dioxus E2E synthetic drag path still fragile — frame-wait timing between dragstart and dragover may need adjustment for CI environments
Docs PR (#721) was still in Codex review cycle at session end; final approval and merge pending
The adapter-component-dependency-inventory.md had a pre-existing dirty edit in the worktree that was never committed or explained
Utility E2E fixture kept as a single showcase.rs file rather than splitting by component — deferred as too risky to split mid-session
Agnostic GridList spec still shows some bounded-parity language instead of a completed parity matrix; N/A axes need concrete reason documentation
